mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO scm_hospital_menu_auth (id, hospital_id, menu_id, create_by, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.hospitalId}, #{item.menuId}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime})

INSERT IGNORE INTO scm_hospital_menu_auth (id, hospital_id, menu_id, create_by, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.hospitalId}, #{item.menuId}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT menu_id FROM scm_hospital_menu_auth WHERE hospital_id = #{hospitalId}

SELECT h.hospital_id AS hospitalId, CAST(TRIM(a.menu_id) AS UNSIGNED) AS menuId FROM scm_hospital_menu_auth a INNER JOIN scm_hospital h ON h.hospital_id = CAST(TRIM(a.hospital_id) AS UNSIGNED) AND h.del_flag = '0' AND h.status = '0'
